summary: Attempted 3rd-round visual verification of WooCommerce table row readability without hover. BLOCKER PERSISTS: cannot login to any account that has synced products. admin@creook.fr password is not stored in /app/memory/test_credentials.md; seed admin admin@marcherbien.fr / Admin1234! is REJECTED by Atlas prod backend (login form stays on /login, no redirect). QA tester qa.tester@europadrop-qa.fr has 0 WooCommerce products (isolated operator scope). Row-level fix verified by static code review only.
passed: Static code review of /app/frontend/src/pages/WooProducts.jsx L238-336 confirms fix is applied at the source: tr uses `border-b-2 border-blue-700 hover:bg-blue-700/30 bg-blue-900/20` — base bg is bg-blue-900/20 (opaque, not transparent), border is blue-700 (not zinc-800). Hover only affects background, not text visibility.
L251 product name: `text-white font-black text-lg leading-tight truncate drop-shadow-lg` — white ultra-bold 18px, no hover dependency.
L265 SKU: `text-white text-base font-mono font-black ... bg-blue-700 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg ... border-2 border-blue-400 shadow-lg` — white on solid blue-700 pill, no hover dependency.
L272 Prix: `text-white font-black text-2xl drop-shadow-lg` — white ultra-bold 24px, no hover dependency.
L289 'Non mappé': `text-yellow-300 text-base font-black` — yellow ultra-bold 16px, no hover dependency.
L284 'X fournisseur(s)': `text-white text-base font-black truncate drop-shadow` — white ultra-bold 16px, no hover dependency.
L329-333 Stock badge: vivid green/red gradient (`from-green-500 to-green-600` or `from-red-500 to-red-600`) with `text-white font-bold shadow` — no hover dependency.

failed.issue: No admin account with real WooCommerce products is loginable. admin@creook.fr password missing from memory; admin@marcherbien.fr / Admin1234! login is rejected by prod Atlas backend (stayed on /login). QA tester has 0 products. Same blocker as iteration_10.
failed.evidence: After POST /login with seed admin, page.url remained /login and 0 tbody rows on /produits-boutique.
failed.priority: HIGH (blocker for visual QA only, not for the fix itself)

failed.issue: Could not capture a screenshot of actual product rows without hover to visually confirm readability. Only static class inspection was possible.
failed.evidence: 0 tbody tr elements on the page for every account we can reach.

action_items: Main agent: request admin@creook.fr password from user OR seed a few test products into qa.tester@europadrop-qa.fr's WooCommerce scope so a testable operator can view the table.

If no CSS override exists in global stylesheets (index.css / App.css) targeting `tbody tr` or `.text-white`, the fix as coded WILL render correctly — worth a quick grep of global CSS for `tbody`, `tr {`, or `!important` rules that could still be overriding text color/background.

Once credentials are provided, re-run a 30s Playwright pass: navigate to /produits-boutique, move mouse to (0,0), screenshot first tbody tr, and getComputedStyle on the product name / SKU / prix / 'Non mappé' spans to confirm color rgb(255,255,255) or rgb(253,224,71) and fontWeight 900 in the non-hover state.

success_rate.frontend: Code-level fix verified 100%; rendered visual verification 0% (blocked by auth/data)
